title: monolophus bolavenensis
intro: Monolophus bolavenensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Bolaven spurge. It is native to Laos and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, Monolophus bolavenensis is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
